Member-only story

5 min read
2 hours ago

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

I applied for this Remote role for a Frontend engineer at Certa. Soon after applying, I received an email invite for a screening round.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Email Invite ScreenshotScreening Round: JS & Web Development Quiz
Duration: 90 mins
It was a test mix of 6 MCQs and 1 DSA problem. Let’s take a deep dive into the test.
1. Object Copying
How can you create a deep copy of an object in JavaScript?

• Object.create(obj)

• JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj))

• Array.from(obj)

• Object.assign({}, obj)
Correct Answer: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj))
2. Variable Scoping & Hoisting
What will be the output of the following code?
let x = 10;
(function() {
console.log(x);
let x = 20;
console.log(x);
})();
• 10 and undefined

• 10 and 20

• undefined and 20

• ReferenceError
